   576→    /**
   577→     * 提取 B站视频标识（BV号或av号）
   578→     * 支持 BV 号、av 号和 b23.tv 短链接
   579→     */
   580→    private fun extractBVID(url: String): String? {
   581→        // 优先匹配 BV 号
   582→        val bvPattern = Regex("(BV[a-zA-Z0-9]{10})")
   583→        val bvMatch = bvPattern.find(url)
   584→        if (bvMatch != null) return bvMatch.groupValues[1]
   585→
   586→        // 匹配 av 号（转换为请求参数用）
   587→        val avPattern = Regex("av(\\d+)", RegexOption.IGNORE_CASE)
   588→        val avMatch = avPattern.find(url)
   589→        if (avMatch != null) return "av${avMatch.groupValues[1]}"
   590→
   591→        return null
   592→    }
   593→
   594→    /**
   595→     * 解析 b23.tv 短链接，获取真实 URL
   596→     */
   597→    private suspend fun resolveB23ShortLink(url: String): String? = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   598→        try {
   599→            val noRedirectClient = OkHttpClient.Builder()
   600→                .connectTimeout(10, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
   601→                .readTimeout(10, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
   602→                .followRedirects(false)
   603→                .build()
   604→
   605→            val request = Request.Builder()
   606→                .url(url)
   607→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   608→                .build()
   609→
   610→            val response = noRedirectClient.newCall(request).execute()
   611→            val location = response.header("Location")
   612→            response.close()
   613→            location
   614→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   615→            Log.e(TAG, "Failed to resolve b23.tv short link", e)
   616→            null
   617→        }
   618→    }
   619→
   620→    /**
   621→     * 提取 YouTube 视频 ID
   622→     * 支持格式: watch?v=, youtu.be/, embed/, shorts/, v/, live/
   623→     */
   624→    private fun extractYoutubeVideoId(url: String): String? {
   625→        val patterns = listOf(
   626→            Regex("(?:youtube\\.com/watch\\?.*v=)([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})"),
   627→            Regex("youtu\\.be/([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})"),
   628→            Regex("youtube\\.com/embed/([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})"),
   629→            Regex("youtube\\.com/shorts/([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})"),
   630→            Regex("youtube\\.com/v/([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})"),
   631→            Regex("youtube\\.com/live/([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})")
   632→        )
   633→
   634→        for (pattern in patterns) {
   635→            val match = pattern.find(url)
   636→            if (match != null) {
   637→                return match.groupValues[1]
   638→            }
   639→        }
   640→        return null
   641→    }

   643→    /**
   644→     * 获取 B站视频信息 - 改进版，优先使用官方API
   645→     * 基于 GitHub 研究：bilibili-api Kotlin 库实现
   646→     *
   647→     * 策略：
   648→     * 1. 优先使用 B站官方 API
   649→     * 2. 官方API失败后，尝试第三方API作为备用
   650→     */
   651→    private suspend fun fetchBilibiliInfo(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> {
   652→        Log.d(TAG, "Fetching Bilibili info for: $url")
   653→
   654→        // 策略1: 尝试官方API
   655→        val officialResult = fetchBilibiliOfficialAPI(url)
   656→        if (officialResult.isSuccess) {
   657→            Log.d(TAG, "Official API success")
   658→            return officialResult
   659→        }
   660→        Log.w(TAG, "Official API failed: ${officialResult.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
   661→
   662→        // 策略2: 尝试第三方API（备用）
   663→        return fetchBilibiliThirdPartyAPI(url)
   664→    }
   665→
   666→    /**
   667→     * 使用 B站官方 API 解析
   668→     * 参考 bilibili-api (Kotlin): https://github.com/czp3009/bilibili-api
   669→     *
   670→     * API 端点：
   671→     * - 视频信息: https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/view?bvid={bvid}
   672→     * - 播放地址: https://api.bilibili.com/x/player/playurl?bvid={bvid}&cid={cid}
   673→     */
   674→    private suspend fun fetchBilibiliOfficialAPI(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   675→        try {
   676→            // 1. 如果是 b23.tv 短链接，先解析真实 URL
   677→            var realUrl = url
   678→            if (url.contains("b23.tv")) {
   679→                val resolved = resolveB23ShortLink(url)
   680→                if (resolved != null) {
   681→                    realUrl = resolved
   682→                    Log.d(TAG, "Resolved b23.tv -> $realUrl")
   683→                } else {
   684→                    return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法解析b23.tv短链接"))
   685→                }
   686→            }
   687→
   688→            // 2. 提取视频标识（BV号或av号）
   689→            val videoId = extractBVID(realUrl)
   690→            if (videoId == null) {
   691→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法提取BV号或av号"))
   692→            }
   693→            Log.d(TAG, "Video ID: $videoId")
   694→
   695→            // 获取Cookie（如果有配置）
   696→            val cookie = getCookieForPlatform(url)
   697→            if (cookie != null) {
   698→                Log.d(TAG, "Using configured cookies for Bilibili API")
   699→            }
   700→
   701→            // 3. 获取视频信息（获取 cid）- 支持 BV 号和 av 号
   702→            val infoUrl = if (videoId.startsWith("av")) {
   703→                "https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/view?aid=${videoId.removePrefix("av")}"
   704→            } else {
   705→                "https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/view?bvid=$videoId"
   706→            }
   707→            val infoRequestBuilder = Request.Builder()
   708→                .url(infoUrl)
   709→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   710→                .header("Referer", "https://www.bilibili.com/")
   711→
   712→            // 添加Cookie
   713→            if (cookie != null) {
   714→                infoRequestBuilder.header("Cookie", cookie)
   715→            }
   716→
   717→            val infoRequest = infoRequestBuilder.build()
   718→
   719→            val infoResponse = client.newCall(infoRequest).execute()
   720→            val infoBody = infoResponse.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   721→            val infoJson = JSONObject(infoBody)
   722→
   723→            if (infoJson.optInt("code", -1) != 0) {
   724→                val errorMsg = infoJson.optString("message")
   725→                // 检查是否是需要Cookie的错误
   726→                if (errorMsg.contains("登录") || errorMsg.contains("会员") || errorMsg.contains("权限")) {
   727→                    return@withContext Result.failure(
   728→                        Exception("❌ 需要登录或会员权限\n\n错误信息: $errorMsg\n\n解决方案：\n• 在设置中配置B站Cookie（SESSDATA）\n• 或使用「导入本地视频」功能")
   729→                    )
   730→                }
   731→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API错误: $errorMsg"))
   732→            }
   733→
   734→            val data = infoJson.getJSONObject("data")
   735→            val cid = data.optLong("cid")
   736→            val title = data.optString("title")
   737→            val cover = data.optString("pic").replace("\\/\\\\/", "/")
   738→            val duration = data.optInt("duration")
   739→            val author = data.optJSONObject("owner")?.optString("name") ?: "未知UP主"
   740→
   741→            Log.d(TAG, "Video info: $title, cid=$cid")
   742→
   743→            // 4. 获取播放URL - 使用DASH格式（fnval=4048支持全部格式）
   744→            val bvParam = if (videoId.startsWith("av")) "avid=${videoId.removePrefix("av")}" else "bvid=$videoId"
   745→            val playUrl = "https://api.bilibili.com/x/player/playurl?$bvParam&cid=$cid&qn=116&fnval=4048&fnver=0&fourk=1"
   746→            val playRequestBuilder = Request.Builder()
   747→                .url(playUrl)
   748→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   749→                .header("Referer", "https://www.bilibili.com/")
   750→
   751→            if (cookie != null) {
   752→                playRequestBuilder.header("Cookie", cookie)
   753→            }
   754→
   755→            val playRequest = playRequestBuilder.build()
   756→            val playResponse = client.newCall(playRequest).execute()
   757→            val playBody = playResponse.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   758→            val playJson = JSONObject(playBody)
   759→
   760→            if (playJson.optInt("code", -1) != 0) {
   761→                val errorMsg = playJson.optString("message")
   762→                if (errorMsg.contains("登录") || errorMsg.contains("会员") || errorMsg.contains("权限")) {
   763→                    return@withContext Result.failure(
   764→                        Exception("❌ 需要登录或会员权限\n\n错误信息: $errorMsg\n\n解决方案：\n• 在设置中配置B站Cookie（SESSDATA）\n• 或使用「导入本地视频」功能")
   765→                    )
   766→                }
   767→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("获取播放URL失败: $errorMsg"))
   768→            }
   769→
   770→            val playData = playJson.getJSONObject("data")
   771→            val dash = playData.optJSONObject("dash")
   772→            val durl = playData.optJSONArray("durl")
   773→
   774→            var videoUrl: String? = null
   775→            var audioUrl: String? = null
   776→
   777→            if (durl != null && durl.length() > 0) {
   778→                // MP4格式（包含音视频）
   779→                videoUrl = durl.getJSONObject(0).optString("url")
   780→            } else if (dash != null) {
   781→                // DASH格式 - 选择最佳画质的视频流
   782→                val dashVideo = dash.optJSONArray("video")
   783→                val dashAudio = dash.optJSONArray("audio")
   784→
   785→                if (dashVideo != null && dashVideo.length() > 0) {
   786→                    // 按bandwidth降序选择最佳画质（优先选择高码率）
   787→                    var bestBandwidth = 0L
   788→                    for (i in 0 until dashVideo.length()) {
   789→                        val v = dashVideo.getJSONObject(i)
   790→                        val bw = v.optLong("bandwidth", 0)
   791→                        if (bw > bestBandwidth) {
   792→                            bestBandwidth = bw
   793→                            videoUrl = v.optString("baseUrl").takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }
   794→                                ?: v.optString("base_url")
   795→                        }
   796→                    }
   797→                    // 选择最佳音频质量
   798→                    if (dashAudio != null && dashAudio.length() > 0) {
   799→                        var bestAudioBw = 0L
   800→                        for (i in 0 until dashAudio.length()) {
   801→                            val a = dashAudio.getJSONObject(i)
   802→                            val bw = a.optLong("bandwidth", 0)
   803→                            if (bw > bestAudioBw) {
   804→                                bestAudioBw = bw
   805→                                audioUrl = a.optString("baseUrl").takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }
   806→                                    ?: a.optString("base_url")
   807→                            }
   808→                        }
   809→                    }
   810→                    Log.d(TAG, "DASH format: best video bandwidth=$bestBandwidth, hasAudio=${audioUrl != null}")
   811→                }
   812→            }
   813→
   814→            if (videoUrl != null) {
   815→                Log.d(TAG, "Got video URL from official API, cookies used: ${cookie != null}, hasAudio: ${audioUrl != null}")
   816→                return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   817→                    title = title,
   818→                    downloadUrl = videoUrl,
   819→                    cover = cover,
   820→                    duration = duration.toLong(),
   821→                    author = author,
   822→                    cookies = cookie,
   823→                    platform = VideoPlatform.BILIBILI,
   824→                    audioUrl = audioUrl
   825→                ))
   826→            }
   827→
   828→            Result.failure(Exception("无法获取播放地址"))
   829→
   830→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   831→            Log.e(TAG, "Official API error", e)
   832→            Result.failure(e)

   888→    /**
   889→     * 使用指定 API 获取 B站视频信息
   890→     */
   891→    private suspend fun fetchBilibiliInfoWithApi(api: BilibiliApiConfig): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   892→        // 健康检查：跳过已知不可用的 API
   893→        if (!isApiHealthy(api.endpoint)) {
   894→            Log.w(TAG, "[${api.name}] API is marked as unhealthy, skipping")
   895→            return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API暂时不可用"))
   896→        }
   897→
   898→        val startTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   899→        try {
   900→            val request = Request.Builder()
   901→                .url(api.endpoint)
   902→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   903→                .header("Referer", "https://www.bilibili.com/")
   904→                .build()
   905→
   906→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   907→            val responseTime = System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime
   908→            val responseBody = response.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   909→
   910→            Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Response: ${responseBody.take(300)}")
   911→
   912→            // 检查是否是HTML响应（API可能失效）
   913→            if (responseBody.trim().startsWith("<!DOCTYPE") || responseBody.trim().startsWith("<html")) {
   914→                Log.w(TAG, "[${api.name}] API returned HTML, may be invalid")
   915→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回HTML，可能已失效"))
   916→            }
   917→
   918→            val json = JSONObject(responseBody)
   919→
   920→            // 尝试多种返回格式解析
   921→
   922→            // 格式1: {data: {url: "...", title: "..."}}
   923→            if (json.has("data")) {
   924→                val data = json.getJSONObject("data")
   925→                val videoUrl = data.optJSONArray("url")?.optString(0)
   926→                    ?: data.optString("url")
   927→                    ?: data.optString("video_url")
   928→                    ?: data.optString("playurl")
   929→                    ?: data.optString("download_url")
   930→
   931→                val title = data.optString("title")
   932→                    ?: data.optString("name")
   933→                    ?: "B站视频"
   934→
   935→                if (videoUrl.isNotEmpty() && videoUrl.startsWith("http")) {
   936→                    Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Got video URL: $videoUrl")
   937→                    updateApiHealth(api.endpoint, true, responseTime)
   938→                    return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   939→                        title = title,
   940→                        downloadUrl = videoUrl,
   941→                        cover = data.optString("pic")
   942→                            ?: data.optString("cover")
   943→                            ?: data.optString("img"),
   944→                        duration = data.optLong("duration", 0L) / 1000,
   945→                        author = data.optString("author")
   946→                            ?: data.optString("uploader")
   947→                            ?: data.optString("owner")?.let { ownerJson ->
   948→                                try { JSONObject(ownerJson).optString("name") } catch(e: Exception) { null }
   949→                            }
   950→                    ))
   951→                }
   952→            }
   953→
   954→            // 格式2: {url: "...", title: "..."}
   955→            val directUrl = json.optString("url")
   956→                ?: json.optString("video_url")
   957→                ?: json.optString("playurl")
   958→                ?: json.optString("download_url")
   959→
   960→            if (directUrl.startsWith("http")) {
   961→                val title = json.optString("title") ?: "B站视频"
   962→                Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Got direct URL: $directUrl")
   963→                updateApiHealth(api.endpoint, true, responseTime)
   964→                return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   965→                    title = title,
   966→                    downloadUrl = directUrl,
   967→                    cover = json.optString("pic") ?: json.optString("cover"),
   968→                    duration = json.optLong("duration", 0L) / 1000,
   969→                    author = json.optString("author")
   970→                ))
   971→            }
   972→
   973→            // 格式3: {code: 200, data: {url: "..."}} 或 {code: 200, url: "..."}
   974→            if (json.optInt("code") == 200 || json.optInt("code") == 1) {
   975→                val nestedData = json.optJSONObject("data")
   976→                val videoUrl = nestedData?.optString("url")
   977→                    ?: nestedData?.optString("video_url")
   978→                    ?: json.optString("url")
   979→                    ?: json.optString("video_url")
   980→
   981→                if (videoUrl?.startsWith("http") == true) {
   982→                    val title = nestedData?.optString("title")
   983→                        ?: json.optString("title")
   984→                        ?: "B站视频"
   985→                    updateApiHealth(api.endpoint, true, responseTime)
   986→                    return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   987→                        title = title,
   988→                        downloadUrl = videoUrl,
   989→                        cover = nestedData?.optString("pic") ?: json.optString("pic"),
   990→                        duration = nestedData?.optLong("duration", 0L)?.div(1000) ?: 0L
   991→                    ))
   992→                }
   993→            }
   994→
   995→            // 格式4: {msg: "...", code: ...} - 可能包含错误信息
   996→            val msg = json.optString("msg") ?: json.optString("message")
   997→            if (msg.isNotEmpty()) {
   998→                updateApiHealth(api.endpoint, false, responseTime, msg)
   999→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回: $msg"))
  1000→            }
  1001→
  1002→            // 无法解析
  1003→            updateApiHealth(api.endpoint, false, responseTime, "无法解析API响应格式")
  1004→            return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法解析API响应格式"))
  1005→
  1006→        } catch (e: Exception) {
  1007→            val responseTime = System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime
  1008→            updateApiHealth(api.endpoint, false, responseTime, e.message)
  1009→            Log.e(TAG, "[${api.name}] Request failed", e)
  1010→            Result.failure(e)
  1011→        }
  1012→    }

  1070→    /**
  1071→     * 使用指定 API 获取抖音视频信息
  1072→     */
  1073→    private suspend fun fetchDouyinInfoWithApi(api: DouyinApiConfig): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
  1074→        try {
  1075→            val request = Request.Builder()
  1076→                .url(api.endpoint)
  1077→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
  1078→                .header("Referer", "https://www.douyin.com/")
  1079→                .build()
  1080→
  1081→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
  1082→            val responseBody = response.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
  1083→
  1084→            Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Response: ${responseBody.take(300)}")
  1085→
  1086→            // 检查是否是HTML
  1087→            if (responseBody.trim().startsWith("<!DOCTYPE") || responseBody.trim().startsWith("<html")) {
  1088→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回HTML，可能已失效"))
  1089→            }
  1090→
  1091→            val json = JSONObject(responseBody)
  1092→
  1093→            // 检查响应状态码
  1094→            val code = json.optInt("code")
  1095→            if (code != 200 && code != 1 && code != 0) {
  1096→                val msg = json.optString("msg") ?: json.optString("message") ?: "未知错误"
  1097→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回错误($code): $msg"))
  1098→            }
  1099→
  1100→            // 解析视频数据 - 支持多种格式
  1101→            // 格式1: {code: 200, data: {video: [{play_addr: "..."}], desc: "..."}}
  1102→            if (json.has("data")) {
  1103→                val data = json.getJSONObject("data")
  1104→
  1105→                // 尝试获取视频 URL
  1106→                val videoData = data.optJSONArray("video")?.optJSONObject(0)
  1107→                    ?: data.optJSONArray("data")?.optJSONObject(0)
  1108→                    ?: data
  1109→
  1110→                val videoUrl = videoData.optString("play_addr")
  1111→                    ?: videoData.optString("play_addr_https")
  1112→                    ?: videoData.optString("url")
  1113→                    ?: videoData.optString("video_url")
  1114→                    ?: videoData.optString("download_addr")
  1115→
  1116→                val title = data.optString("desc")
  1117→                    ?: data.optString("title")
  1118→                    ?: data.optString("text")
  1119→                    ?: "抖音视频"
  1120→
  1121→                if (videoUrl.isNotEmpty() && (videoUrl.startsWith("http") || videoUrl.startsWith("//"))) {
  1122→                    // 处理相对协议 URL
  1123→                    val finalUrl = if (videoUrl.startsWith("//")) "https:$videoUrl" else videoUrl
  1124→
  1125→                    // 提取作者信息
  1126→                    val author = data.optJSONObject("author")?.optString("nickname")
  1127→                        ?: data.optString("author")
  1128→                        ?: data.optString("nickname")
  1129→
  1130→                    val cover = data.optString("cover")
  1131→                        ?: data.optString("thumb")
  1132→                        ?: data.optString("origin_cover")
  1133→                        ?: data.optString("dynamic_cover")
  1134→                        ?: videoData.optString("cover")
  1135→
  1136→                    return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
  1137→                        title = title,
  1138→                        downloadUrl = finalUrl,
  1139→                        cover = cover,
  1140→                        duration = videoData.optLong("duration", 0L),
  1141→                        author = author
  1142→                    ))
  1143→                }
  1144→            }
  1145→
  1146→            // 格式2: {url: "...", title: "...", author: "..."}
  1147→            val directUrl = json.optString("url")
  1148→                ?: json.optString("play_addr")
  1149→                ?: json.optString("video_url")
  1150→
  1151→            if (directUrl.startsWith("http") || directUrl.startsWith("//")) {
  1152→                val finalUrl = if (directUrl.startsWith("//")) "https:$directUrl" else directUrl
  1153→                val title = json.optString("title")
  1154→                    ?: json.optString("desc")
  1155→                    ?: json.optString("text")
  1156→                    ?: "抖音视频"
  1157→
  1158→                return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
  1159→                    title = title,
  1160→                    downloadUrl = finalUrl,
  1161→                    cover = json.optString("cover") ?: json.optString("thumb"),
  1162→                    duration = json.optLong("duration", 0L),
  1163→                    author = json.optString("author") ?: json.optString("nickname")
  1164→                ))
  1165→            }
  1166→
  1167→            // 无法获取视频链接
  1168→            return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法从API响应中提取视频链接"))
  1169→
  1170→        } catch (e: Exception) {
  1171→            Log.e(TAG, "[${api.name}] Request failed", e)
  1172→            Result.failure(e)
  1173→        }

  1242→
  1243→            val json = JSONObject(responseBody)

  1245→            // tikwm API 格式: {code: 0, data: {title: "...", play: "...", ...}}

  1280→                if (videoUrl.isNotEmpty() && videoUrl.startsWith("http")) {
  1281→                    return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
  1282→                        title = data.optString("desc") ?: data.optString("title") ?: "TikTok 视频",
  1283→                        downloadUrl = videoUrl,
  1284→                        cover = data.optString("cover") ?: data.optString("thumb"),
  1285→                        duration = videoData.optLong("duration", 0L),
  1286→                        author = data.optJSONObject("author")?.optString("nickname")
  1287→                    ))
  1288→                }
  1289→            }
  1290→
  1291→            // 直接格式
  1292→            val directUrl = json.optString("url") ?: json.optString("video_url")
  1293→            if (directUrl.startsWith("http")) {
  1294→                return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
  1295→                    title = json.optString("title") ?: "TikTok 视频",
  1296→                    downloadUrl = directUrl,
  1297→                    cover = json.optString("cover"),
  1298→                    duration = json.optLong("duration", 0L)
  1299→                ))
  1300→            }
  1301→
  1302→            return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法从API响应中提取视频链接"))
  1303→
  1304→        } catch (e: Exception) {
  1305→            Log.e(TAG, "[${api.name}] Request failed", e)
  1306→            Result.failure(e)
  1307→        }
  1308→    }
  1309→
  1310→    /**
  1311→     * 获取标准 User-Agent
  1312→     * 参考 Electron 版本使用真实的浏览器 UA
  1313→     */
  1314→    private fun getUserAgent(): String {
  1315→        return "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 " +
  1316→               "(KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36"
  1317→    }
  1318→
  1319→    /**
  1320→     * 获取小红书视频信息
  1321→     * 支持格式：
  1322→     * - https://www.xiaohongshu.com/explore/{noteId}
  1323→     * - https://www.xiaohongshu.com/discovery/item/{noteId}
  1324→     * - https://xhslink.com/{shortId}
  1325→     */
  1326→    private suspend fun fetchXiaohongshuInfo(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> {
  1327→        Log.d(TAG, "Fetching Xiaohongshu info for: $url")
  1328→
  1329→        // 尝试多个 API
  1330→        val apis = listOf(
  1331→            XiaohongshuApiConfig("https://api.pearktrue.com/api/v1/parse/xiaohongshu?url=$url", "pearktrue"),
  1332→            XiaohongshuApiConfig("https://api.xboba.com/xiaohongshu/video/download?url=$url", "xboba")
  1333→        )
  1334→
  1335→        for ((index, api) in apis.withIndex()) {
  1336→            try {
  1337→                Log.d(TAG, "[${index + 1}/${apis.size}] Trying Xiaohongshu API: ${api.name}")
  1338→                val result = fetchXiaohongshuInfoWithApi(api)
  1339→                if (result.isSuccess) {
  1340→                    Log.d(TAG, "Successfully fetched info using: ${api.name}")
  1341→                    return result
  1342→                }
  1343→                Log.w(TAG, "API ${api.name} failed: ${result.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
  1344→            } catch (e: Exception) {
  1345→                Log.e(TAG, "API ${api.name} threw exception", e)
  1346→            }
  1347→        }
  1348→
  1349→        return Result.failure(
  1350→            Exception("❌ 小红书解析失败\n\n已尝试 ${apis.size} 个 API 均不可用\n\n可能的原因：\n• 笔记是私密内容\n• 笔记已删除\n• API 服务限流\n\n建议：\n• 确认笔记链接有效\n• 使用「导入本地视频」功能\n• 在电脑上使用 res-downloader 等工具")
  1351→        )
  1352→    }
  1353→
  1354→    private suspend fun fetchXiaohongshuInfoWithApi(api: XiaohongshuApiConfig): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
  1355→        try {
  1356→            val request = Request.Builder()
  1357→                .url(api.endpoint)
  1358→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
  1359→                .header("Referer", "https://www.xiaohongshu.com/")
  1360→                .build()
  1361→
  1362→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
  1363→            val responseBody = response.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
  1364→
  1365→            Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Response: ${responseBody.take(300)}")
  1366→
  1367→            if (responseBody.trim().startsWith("<!DOCTYPE") || responseBody.trim().startsWith("<html")) {

  1370→
  1371→            val json = JSONObject(responseBody)

  1394→                if (videoUrl.isNotEmpty() && videoUrl.startsWith("http")) {

  1399→                        duration = data.optLong("duration", 0L),
  1400→                        author = data.optString("author") ?: data.optString("nickname")
  1401→                    ))
  1402→                }
  1403→            }
  1404→
  1405→            Result.failure(Exception("无法从API响应中提取视频链接"))
  1406→
  1407→        } catch (e: Exception) {
  1408→            Log.e(TAG, "[${api.name}] Request failed", e)

  1411→    }
  1412→
  1413→    /**
  1414→     * 获取微信视频号视频信息
  1415→     *
  1416→     * 微信视频号解析方案（安卓限制）：
  1417→     * 由于安卓无法使用代理+证书方式，只能尝试第三方 API
  1418→     *
  1419→     * 参考项目：
  1420→     * - https://github.com/putyy/res-downloader (Go + Wails，多平台支持)
  1421→     * - https://github.com/ltaoo/wx_channels_download (注入下载按钮)
  1422→     *

  1426→     */
  1427→    private suspend fun fetchWechatChannelsInfo(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> {

  1429→
  1430→        // 尝试多个第三方 API

  1437→        for ((index, api) in apis.withIndex()) {

  1446→            } catch (e: Exception) {

  1448→            }
  1449→        }
  1450→
  1451→        // 如果所有 API 都失败，返回友好错误
  1452→        return Result.failure(

  1455→                "由于微信视频号的特殊保护机制，安卓端暂不支持直接解析。\n\n" +
  1456→                "推荐方案：\n" +
  1457→                "1. 电脑端使用 res-downloader 工具\n" +
  1458→                "   https://github.com/putyy/res-downloader\n\n" +
  1459→                "2. 使用「导入本地视频」功能\n" +
  1460→                "   先在电脑下载后传输到手机\n\n" +
  1461→                "3. 录屏方式\n" +
  1462→                "   使用系统录屏保存视频"
  1463→            )
  1464→        )
  1465→    }
  1466→
  1467→    /**

content.content:
1→package com.multilanglearner.data.network
     2→
     3→import android.util.Log
     4→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
     5→import kotlinx.coroutines.async
     6→import kotlinx.coroutines.awaitAll
     7→import kotlinx.coroutines.coroutineScope
     8→import kotlinx.coroutines.delay
     9→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
    10→import kotlinx.coroutines.yield
    11→import okhttp3.OkHttpClient
    12→import java.io.File
    13→import java.io.IOException
    14→import java.io.RandomAccessFile
    15→import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit
    16→import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicBoolean
    17→import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicLong
    18→import javax.inject.Inject
    19→import javax.inject.Singleton
    20→
    21→/**
    22→ * 分段下载管理器
    23→ * 支持大文件分段下载和断点续传
    24→ *
    25→ * 功能特性：
    26→ * - 支持大文件（>100MB）分段下载
    27→ * - 改进的断点续传（包含校验和）
    28→ * - 详细的进度回调（分段信息、速度、剩余时间）
    29→ * - 并发下载优化
    30→ * - 增强的错误处理和重试机制
    31→ * - 支持取消下载
    32→ */
    33→@Singleton
    34→class SegmentedDownloader @Inject constructor() {
    35→
    36→    private val client = OkHttpClient.Builder()
    37→        .connectTimeout(60, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    38→        .readTimeout(300, TimeUnit.SECONDS) // 5分钟读超时，适合大文件下载
    39→        .writeTimeout(300, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    40→        .build()
    41→
    42→    // 每个分段的大小（5MB）
    43→    private val SEGMENT_SIZE = 5L * 1024 * 1024
    44→
    45→    // 最小分段大小（1MB，小于此文件不分段）
    46→    private val MIN_SEGMENT_SIZE = 1L * 1024 * 1024
    47→
    48→    // 大文件阈值（100MB，超过此值使用更大的分段）
    49→    private val LARGE_FILE_THRESHOLD = 100L * 1024 * 1024
    50→
    51→    // 大文件分段大小（10MB）
    52→    private val LARGE_SEGMENT_SIZE = 10L * 1024 * 1024
    53→
    54→    // 最大并发下载数
    55→    private val MAX_CONCURRENT_DOWNLOADS = 4
    56→
    57→    // 最大重试次数
    58→    private val MAX_RETRY_COUNT = 5
    59→
    60→    // 最大分段数量
    61→    private val MAX_SEGMENT_COUNT = 20
    62→
    63→    /**
    64→     * 根据文件大小和网络状况计算最佳分段大小
    65→     * - 小文件（<50MB）：不分段
    66→     * - 中等文件（50-200MB）：5MB分段
    67→     * - 大文件（>200MB）：10MB分段
    68→     * - 超大文件（>500MB）：15MB分段
    69→     */
    70→    private fun calculateOptimalSegmentSize(fileSize: Long): Long {
    71→        return when {
    72→            fileSize < 50 * 1024 * 1024 -> fileSize // 不分段
    73→            fileSize < 200 * 1024 * 1024 -> 5 * 1024 * 1024
    74→            fileSize < 500 * 1024 * 1024 -> 10 * 1024 * 1024
    75→            else -> 15 * 1024 * 1024
    76→        }
    77→    }
    78→    // 重试延迟（毫秒）
    79→    private val RETRY_DELAY_MS = 3000L
    80→
    81→    // 当前下载的取消标志
    82→    private val currentCancellationFlag = AtomicBoolean(false)
    83→
    84→    // 下载速度采样窗口（用于动态调整分段大小）
    85→    private val speedSamples = mutableListOf<Long>()
    86→    private var lastSpeedUpdateTime = 0L
    87→
    88→    /**
    89→     * 下载进度回调
    90→     */
    91→    data class DownloadProgress(
    92→        val bytesDownloaded: Long,
    93→        val totalBytes: Long,
    94→        val percent: Int,
    95→        val speed: Long, // bytes per second
    96→        val segmentIndex: Int, // 当前分段索引（1-based）
    97→        val totalSegments: Int, // 总分段数
    98→        val completedSegments: Set<Int>, // 已完成的分段索引集合
    99→        val currentSegmentBytes: Long = 0, // 当前分段已下载字节数
   100→        val currentSegmentTotal: Long = 0, // 当前分段总字节数
   101→        val remainingTimeSeconds: Long = 0, // 预计剩余时间（秒）
   102→        val activeConnections: Int = 1 // 当前活跃连接数
   103→    )
   104→
   105→    /**
   106→     * 下载配置
   107→     */
   108→    data class DownloadConfig(
   109→        val url: String,
   110→        val outputFile: File,
   111→        val segmentSize: Long = 5L * 1024 * 1024, // 5MB
   112→        val enableResume: Boolean = true,
   113→        val maxRetries: Int = 3,
   114→        val concurrentDownloads: Int = 3,
   115→        val cookies: String? = null, // 添加Cookie支持
   116→        val audioUrl: String? = null, // 音频流URL（用于DASH格式）
   117→        val onProgress: (DownloadProgress) -> Unit = {},
   118→        val onSegmentComplete: (segmentIndex: Int, success: Boolean) -> Unit = { _, _ -> }
   119→    )
   120→
   121→    /**
   122→     * 分段状态信息
   123→     */
   124→    private data class SegmentState(
   125→        val index: Int,
   126→        val start: Long,
   127→        val end: Long,
   128→        val downloadedBytes: Long = 0,
   129→        val isCompleted: Boolean = false,
   130→        val checksum: Long = 0 // 简单校验和
   131→    )
   132→
   133→    /**
   134→     * 断点续传状态
   135→     */
   136→    private data class ResumeState(
   137→        val fileSize: Long,
   138→        val segmentSize: Long,
   139→        val segments: List<SegmentState>,
   140→        val timestamp: Long = System.currentTimeMillis()
   141→    )
   142→    suspend fun download(config: DownloadConfig): Result<File> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   143→        try {
   144→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Starting download: ${config.url}")
   145→
   146→            // 如果有音频URL，使用音视频合并流程
   147→            if (config.audioUrl != null) {
   148→                Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Audio URL provided, using merge mode")
   149→                return@withContext downloadAndMerge(config)
   150→            }
   151→
   152→            // 获取文件大小
   153→            val fileSize = getContentLength(config.url)
   154→            if (fileSize <= 0) {
   155→                // 不支持分段下载，使用普通下载
   156→                Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Segmented download not supported, using simple download")
   157→                return@withContext simpleDownload(config)
   158→            }
   159→
   160→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "File size: $fileSize bytes")
   161→
   162→            // 判断是否需要分段
   163→            if (fileSize < MIN_SEGMENT_SIZE) {
   164→                Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "File too small for segmentation, using simple download")
   165→                return@withContext simpleDownload(config)
   166→            }
   167→
   168→            // 动态计算最佳分段大小，并确保分段数量不超过上限
   169→            var segmentSize = calculateOptimalSegmentSize(fileSize)
   170→            var segmentCount = ((fileSize + segmentSize - 1) / segmentSize).toInt()
   171→
   172→            // 如果分段数量超过上限，调整分段大小
   173→            if (segmentCount > MAX_SEGMENT_COUNT) {
   174→                segmentSize = (fileSize + MAX_SEGMENT_COUNT - 1) / MAX_SEGMENT_COUNT
   175→                segmentCount = MAX_SEGMENT_COUNT
   176→                Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Adjusted segment size to $segmentSize to limit segments to $MAX_SEGMENT_COUNT")
   177→            }
   178→
   179→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Splitting into $segmentCount segments (size: $segmentSize bytes)")
   180→
   181→            // 创建临时文件
   182→            val tempFile = File(config.outputFile.absolutePath + ".tmp")
   183→            val raf = RandomAccessFile(tempFile, "rw")
   184→            raf.setLength(fileSize)
   185→
   186→            // 下载每个分段 - 使用并行下载优化
   187→            val downloadedSegments = if (config.enableResume) {
   188→                loadResumeState(tempFile)
   189→            } else {
   190→                mutableSetOf()
   191→            }
   192→
   193→            val totalDownloaded = AtomicLong(0)
   194→            val startTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   195→            val failedSegments = mutableSetOf<Int>()
   196→            val segmentMutex = java.util.concurrent.locks.ReentrantLock()
   197→
   198→            // 计算需要下载的分段
   199→            val pendingSegments = (0 until segmentCount).filter { it !in downloadedSegments }
   200→
   201→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Pending segments: ${pendingSegments.size}/${segmentCount}, parallel: ${config.concurrentDownloads}")
   202→
   203→            // 并行下载分段
   204→            coroutineScope {
   205→                pendingSegments.chunked(config.concurrentDownloads).forEach { batch ->
   206→                    batch.map { i ->
   207→                        async(Dispatchers.IO) {
   208→                            val start = i * segmentSize
   209→                            val end = minOf(start + segmentSize - 1, fileSize - 1)
   210→
   211→                            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Downloading segment $i: $start-$end")
   212→
   213→                            try {
   214→                                val success = downloadSegment(config.url, tempFile, start, end, config.cookies) { bytes ->
   215→                                    val currentTotal = totalDownloaded.addAndGet(bytes)
   216→                                    val elapsed = (System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime) / 1000.0
   217→                                    val speed = if (elapsed > 0) currentTotal / elapsed.toLong() else 0
   218→
   219→                                    // 记录速度样本
   220→                                    synchronized(speedSamples) {
   221→                                        speedSamples.add(speed)
   222→                                        if (speedSamples.size > 10) speedSamples.removeAt(0)
   223→                                    }
   224→
   225→                                    // 计算进度
   226→                                    val progress = ((currentTotal * 100) / fileSize).toInt().coerceAtMost(99)
   227→
   228→                                    config.onProgress(DownloadProgress(
   229→                                        bytesDownloaded = currentTotal,
   230→                                        totalBytes = fileSize,
   231→                                        percent = progress,
   232→                                        speed = speed,
   233→                                        segmentIndex = i + 1,
   234→                                        totalSegments = segmentCount,
   235→                                        completedSegments = downloadedSegments.toSet(),
   236→                                        activeConnections = batch.size
   237→                                    ))
   238→                                }
   239→
   240→                                if (success) {
   241→                                    segmentMutex.lock()
   242→                                    try {
   243→                                        downloadedSegments.add(i)
   244→                                        saveResumeState(tempFile, downloadedSegments)
   245→                                    } finally {
   246→                                        segmentMutex.unlock()
   247→                                    }
   248→                                    true
   249→                                } else {
   250→                                    Log.w("SegmentedDownloader", "Segment $i download failed after retries")
   251→                                    segmentMutex.lock()
   252→                                    try {
   253→                                        failedSegments.add(i)
   254→                                    } finally {
   255→                                        segmentMutex.unlock()
   256→                                    }
   257→                                    false
   258→                                }
   259→                            } catch (e: Exception) {
   260→                                Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to download segment $i", e)
   261→                                segmentMutex.lock()
   262→                                try {
   263→                                    failedSegments.add(i)
   264→                                } finally {
   265→                                    segmentMutex.unlock()
   266→                                }
   267→                                false
   268→                            }
   269→                        }
   270→                    }.awaitAll()
   271→                }
   272→            }
   273→
   274→            // 重试失败的分段（串行重试，更稳定）
   275→            if (failedSegments.isNotEmpty()) {
   276→                Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Retrying ${failedSegments.size} failed segments...")
   277→                val toRetry = failedSegments.toList()
   278→                failedSegments.clear()
   279→
   280→                for (i in toRetry) {
   281→                    val start = i * segmentSize
   282→                    val end = minOf(start + segmentSize - 1, fileSize - 1)
   283→
   284→                    try {
   285→                        val success = downloadSegment(config.url, tempFile, start, end, config.cookies) { bytes ->
   286→                            val currentTotal = totalDownloaded.addAndGet(bytes)
   287→                            val elapsed = (System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime) / 1000.0
   288→                            val speed = if (elapsed > 0) currentTotal / elapsed.toLong() else 0
   289→                            val progress = ((currentTotal * 100) / fileSize).toInt().coerceAtMost(99)
   290→
   291→                            config.onProgress(DownloadProgress(
   292→                                bytesDownloaded = currentTotal,
   293→                                totalBytes = fileSize,
   294→                                percent = progress,
   295→                                speed = speed,
   296→                                segmentIndex = i + 1,
   297→                                totalSegments = segmentCount,
   298→                                completedSegments = downloadedSegments.toSet(),
   299→                                activeConnections = 1
   300→                            ))
   301→                        }
   302→
   303→                        if (success) {
   304→                            downloadedSegments.add(i)
   305→                            saveResumeState(tempFile, downloadedSegments)
   306→                        }
   307→                    } catch (e: Exception) {
   308→                        Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Retry failed for segment $i", e)
   309→                    }
   310→                }
   311→            }
   312→
   313→            raf.close()
   314→
   315→            // 发送100%完成进度
   316→            config.onProgress(DownloadProgress(
   317→                bytesDownloaded = fileSize,
   318→                totalBytes = fileSize,
   319→                percent = 100,
   320→                speed = 0,
   321→                segmentIndex = segmentCount,
   322→                totalSegments = segmentCount,
   323→                completedSegments = downloadedSegments.toSet()
   324→            ))
   325→
   326→            // 重命名为最终文件
   327→            if (config.outputFile.exists()) {
   328→                config.outputFile.delete()
   329→            }
   330→            tempFile.renameTo(config.outputFile)
   331→
   332→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Download completed: ${config.outputFile.absolutePath}")
   333→            Result.success(config.outputFile)
   334→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   335→            Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Download failed", e)
   336→            Result.failure(e)
   337→        }
   338→    }
   339→
   340→    /**
   341→     * 下载并合并音频和视频流（用于DASH格式）
   342→     */
   343→    private suspend fun downloadAndMerge(config: DownloadConfig): Result<File> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   344→        Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Starting audio+video merge download")
   345→
   346→        val videoFile = File(config.outputFile.absolutePath + ".video.mp4")
   347→        val audioFile = File(config.outputFile.absolutePath + ".audio.m4a")
   348→        val mergeOutputFile = config.outputFile
   349→
   350→        try {
   351→            // 更新进度：准备下载
   352→            config.onProgress(DownloadProgress(
   353→                bytesDownloaded = 0,
   354→                totalBytes = 100,
   355→                percent = 0,
   356→                speed = 0,
   357→                segmentIndex = 0,
   358→                totalSegments = 2,
   359→                completedSegments = emptySet()
   360→            ))
   361→
   362→            // 1. 下载视频流
   363→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Downloading video stream...")
   364→            val videoConfig = config.copy(outputFile = videoFile, audioUrl = null)
   365→            val videoResult = simpleDownload(videoConfig)
   366→
   367→            if (videoResult.isFailure) {
   368→                Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to download video: ${videoResult.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
   369→                return@withContext Result.failure(videoResult.exceptionOrNull() ?: Exception("视频下载失败"))
   370→            }
   371→
   372→            // 更新进度：视频下载完成
   373→            config.onProgress(DownloadProgress(
   374→                bytesDownloaded = 50,
   375→                totalBytes = 100,
   376→                percent = 50,
   377→                speed = 0,
   378→                segmentIndex = 1,
   379→                totalSegments = 2,
   380→                completedSegments = setOf(0)
   381→            ))
   382→
   383→            // 2. 下载音频流
   384→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Downloading audio stream...")
   385→            val audioConfig = config.copy(outputFile = audioFile, url = config.audioUrl!!)
   386→            val audioResult = simpleDownload(audioConfig)
   387→
   388→            if (audioResult.isFailure) {
   389→                Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to download audio: ${audioResult.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
   390→                // 音频下载失败，仍然尝试使用视频文件
   391→                videoFile.renameTo(mergeOutputFile)
   392→                return@withContext Result.success(mergeOutputFile)
   393→            }
   394→
   395→            // 更新进度：准备合并
   396→            config.onProgress(DownloadProgress(
   397→                bytesDownloaded = 90,
   398→                totalBytes = 100,
   399→                percent = 90,
   400→                speed = 0,
   401→                segmentIndex = 2,
   402→                totalSegments = 2,
   403→                completedSegments = setOf(0, 1)
   404→            ))
   405→
   406→            // 3. 使用ffmpeg合并音频和视频
   407→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Merging audio and video with ffmpeg...")
   408→            val mergeResult = mergeAudioVideo(videoFile, audioFile, mergeOutputFile)
   409→
   410→            if (mergeResult) {
   411→                // 清理临时文件
   412→                videoFile.delete()
   413→                audioFile.delete()
   414→
   415→                Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Merge completed: ${mergeOutputFile.absolutePath}")
   416→
   417→                // 发送100%完成进度
   418→                config.onProgress(DownloadProgress(
   419→                    bytesDownloaded = 100,
   420→                    totalBytes = 100,
   421→                    percent = 100,
   422→                    speed = 0,
   423→                    segmentIndex = 2,
   424→                    totalSegments = 2,
   425→                    completedSegments = setOf(0, 1)
   426→                ))
   427→
   428→                Result.success(mergeOutputFile)
   429→            } else {
   430→                Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to merge audio and video, trying copy-only fallback")
   431→                // 尝试用 -c:a aac 重编码音频作为兜底
   432→                val fallbackCommand = buildString {
   433→                    append("-y -i \"${videoFile.absolutePath}\" ")
   434→                    append("-i \"${audioFile.absolutePath}\" ")
   435→                    append("-c:v copy -c:a aac -f mp4 ")
   436→                    append("\"${mergeOutputFile.absolutePath}\"")
   437→                }
   438→                val fallbackSession = com.arthenica.ffmpegkit.FFmpegKit.execute(fallbackCommand)
   439→                val fallbackSuccess = (fallbackSession.returnCode?.value == 0) && mergeOutputFile.exists() && mergeOutputFile.length() > 1024
   440→
   441→                if (fallbackSuccess) {
   442→                    videoFile.delete()
   443→                    audioFile.delete()
   444→                    Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Fallback merge succeeded with re-encoding")
   445→                    Result.success(mergeOutputFile)
   446→                } else {
   447→                    // 兜底也失败，使用无音频的视频文件
   448→                    Log.w("SegmentedDownloader", "All merge attempts failed, using video-only file")
   449→                    videoFile.renameTo(mergeOutputFile)
   450→                    audioFile.delete()
   451→                    Result.success(mergeOutputFile) // 视频可用但无音频
   452→                }
   453→            }
   454→
   455→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   456→            Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Merge download failed", e)
   457→            // 清理临时文件
   458→            if (videoFile.exists()) videoFile.delete()
   459→            if (audioFile.exists()) audioFile.delete()
   460→            Result.failure(e)
   461→        }
   462→    }
   463→
   464→    /**
   465→     * 使用ffmpeg合并音频和视频
   466→     */
   467→    private suspend fun mergeAudioVideo(videoFile: File, audioFile: File, outputFile: File): Boolean = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   468→        try {
   469→            val command = buildString {
   470→                append("-y -i \"${videoFile.absolutePath}\" ")
   471→                append("-i \"${audioFile.absolutePath}\" ")
   472→                append("-c:v copy -c:a copy -f mp4 ")
   473→                append("\"${outputFile.absolutePath}\"")
   474→            }
   475→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "FFmpeg merge command: $command")
   476→
   477→            val session = com.arthenica.ffmpegkit.FFmpegKit.execute(command)
   478→            val returnCode = session.returnCode
   479→            val success = (returnCode?.value == 0) && outputFile.exists() && outputFile.length() > 1024
   480→
   481→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Merge result: $success, return code: ${returnCode?.value}")
   482→            success
   483→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   484→            Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "FFmpeg merge error", e)
   485→            false
   486→        }
   487→    }
   488→
   489→    /**
   490→     * 简单下载（不支持分段）- 带重试机制
   491→     */
   492→    private suspend fun simpleDownload(config: DownloadConfig): Result<File> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   493→        val maxAttempts = config.maxRetries.coerceAtLeast(MAX_RETRY_COUNT)
   494→        var lastError: Exception? = null
   495→
   496→        for (attempt in 0 until maxAttempts) {
   497→            if (attempt > 0) {
   498→                val delayMs = RETRY_DELAY_MS * attempt
   499→                Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Retry $attempt/$maxAttempts, delay ${delayMs}ms")
   500→                delay(delayMs)
   501→            }
   502→
   503→            try {
   504→                return@withContext downloadOnce(config)
   505→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   506→                lastError = e
   507→                val isConnectionError = e.message?.contains("connection abort", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   508→                                     e.message?.contains("Software caused connection abort", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   509→                                     e is java.net.SocketException ||
   510→                                     e is javax.net.ssl.SSLException
   511→
   512→                if (isConnectionError && attempt < maxAttempts - 1) {
   513→                    Log.w("SegmentedDownloader", "Connection error (attempt ${attempt + 1}), will retry: ${e.message}")
   514→                    // 删除可能不完整的文件
   515→                    if (config.outputFile.exists()) {
   516→                        config.outputFile.delete()
   517→                    }
   518→                    // 继续下一次尝试
   519→                } else {
   520→                    // 不可重试的错误或已达到最大重试次数
   521→                    break
   522→                }
   523→            }
   524→        }
   525→
   526→        if (lastError != null) {
   527→            Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Simple download failed after $maxAttempts retries", lastError)
   528→            Result.failure(lastError)
   529→        } else {
   530→            Result.failure(Exception("Download failed: unknown error"))
   531→        }
   532→    }
   533→
   534→    /**
   535→     * 执行一次下载尝试
   536→     */
   537→    private fun downloadOnce(config: DownloadConfig): Result<File> {
   538→        // 添加完整的 headers 避免返回 403
   539→        val requestBuilder = okhttp3.Request.Builder()
   540→            .url(config.url)
   541→            .header("User-Agent", "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36")
   542→            .header("Referer", getRefererFromUrl(config.url))
   543→            .header("Accept", "*/*")
   544→            .header("Accept-Language", "zh-CN,zh;q=0.9,en;q=0.8")
   545→            .header("Origin", getOriginFromUrl(config.url))
   546→            .header("Connection", "keep-alive")
   547→
   548→        // 添加Cookie（如果提供）
   549→        if (!config.cookies.isNullOrEmpty()) {
   550→            requestBuilder.header("Cookie", config.cookies)
   551→            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Using custom cookies for download")
   552→        }
   553→
   554→        val request = requestBuilder.build()
   555→
   556→        val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   557→
   558→        if (!response.isSuccessful) {
   559→            val errorCode = response.code
   560→            val errorDetail = when (errorCode) {
   561→                403 -> {
   562→                    val urlHost = try {
   563→                        java.net.URL(config.url).host
   564→                    } catch (e: Exception) { "未知" }
   565→
   566→                    when {
   567→                        urlHost.contains("bilibili") -> {
   568→                            val hasCookie = !config.cookies.isNullOrEmpty()
   569→                            """
   570→                            HTTP 403 - B站下载被拒绝
   571→
   572→                            当前状态：${if (hasCookie) "已配置Cookie" else "未配置Cookie"}
   573→
   574→                            可能原因：
   575→                            ${if (hasCookie) "• Cookie已过期或无效\n• 视频需要更高权限\n• 下载链接已过期" else "• 视频需要登录才能下载\n• 视频是会员专享内容\n• 下载链接已过期"}
   576→
   577→                            解决方案：
   578→                            ${if (hasCookie) "1. 重新配置B站Cookie（可能已过期）\n2. 检查账号是否有该视频的访问权限" else "1. 点击「下载设置」配置Cookie\n2. 确保SESSDATA填写正确"}
   579→                            3. 或使用「导入本地视频」功能
   580→                            4. 在电脑上使用 yt-dlp 下载后再导入
   581→                        """.trimIndent()
   582→                        }
   583→
   584→                        urlHost.contains("youtube") || urlHost.contains("googlevideo") -> """
   585→                            HTTP 403 - YouTube下载被拒绝
   586→
   587→                            可能原因：
   588→                            • 视频有地区限制
   589→                            • 下载链接已过期
   590→                            • YouTube检测到自动化下载
   591→
   592→                            解决方案：
   593→                            1. 稍后重试（可能是临时限制）
   594→                            2. 使用「导入本地视频」功能
   595→                            3. 在电脑上使用 yt-dlp 下载后再导入
   596→                        """.trimIndent()
   597→
   598→                        else -> """
   599→                            HTTP 403 - 访问被拒绝
   600→
   601→                            可能原因：
   602→                            • 服务器拒绝访问
   603→                            • 需要认证才能下载
   604→
   605→                            解决方案：
   606→                            1. 使用「导入本地视频」功能
   607→                        """.trimIndent()
   608→                    }
   609→                }
   610→                410 -> "HTTP 410 - 下载链接已过期，请重新解析视频"
   611→                404 -> "HTTP 404 - 视频文件不存在，可能已被删除"
   612→                else -> "HTTP $errorCode - 下载失败"
   613→            }
   614→            throw IOException(errorDetail)
   615→        }
   616→
   617→        val body = response.body ?: throw IOException("No response body")
   618→        val inputStream = body.byteStream()
   619→        val totalBytes = body.contentLength()
   620→        var downloadedBytes = 0L
   621→        val startTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   622→
   623→        config.outputFile.outputStream().use { output ->
   624→            val buffer = ByteArray(8 * 1024)
   625→            var bytes: Int
   626→
   627→            while (inputStream.read(buffer).also { bytes = it } > 0) {
   628→                output.write(buffer, 0, bytes)
   629→                downloadedBytes += bytes
   630→
   631→                val elapsed = (System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime) / 1000.0
   632→                val speed = if (elapsed > 0) (downloadedBytes / elapsed).toLong() else 0
   633→
   634→                if (totalBytes > 0) {
   635→                    config.onProgress(DownloadProgress(
   636→                        bytesDownloaded = downloadedBytes,
   637→                        totalBytes = totalBytes,
   638→                        percent = ((downloadedBytes * 100) / totalBytes).toInt().coerceAtMost(99),
   639→                        speed = speed,
   640→                        segmentIndex = 1,
   641→                        totalSegments = 1,
   642→                        completedSegments = emptySet()
   643→                    ))
   644→                }
   645→            }
   646→        }
   647→
   648→        // 发送100%完成进度
   649→        config.onProgress(DownloadProgress(
   650→            bytesDownloaded = config.outputFile.length(),
   651→            totalBytes = config.outputFile.length(),
   652→            percent = 100,
   653→            speed = 0,
   654→            segmentIndex = 1,
   655→            totalSegments = 1,
   656→            completedSegments = setOf(0)
   657→        ))
   658→
   659→        return Result.success(config.outputFile)
   660→    }
   661→
   662→    /**
   663→     * 下载单个分段 - 带重试机制
   664→     */
   665→    private fun downloadSegment(
   666→        url: String,
   667→        file: File,
   668→        start: Long,
   669→        end: Long,
   670→        cookies: String?,
   671→        onBytesDownloaded: (Long) -> Unit
   672→    ): Boolean {
   673→        var lastError: Exception? = null
   674→
   675→        repeat(MAX_RETRY_COUNT) { attempt ->
   676→            if (attempt > 0) {
   677→                Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Segment $start-$end retry $attempt/$MAX_RETRY_COUNT")
   678→                try {
   679→                    Thread.sleep(RETRY_DELAY_MS * attempt)
   680→                } catch (e: InterruptedException) {
   681→                    return false
   682→                }
   683→            }
   684→
   685→            try {
   686→                // 添加完整的 headers 避免返回 403
   687→                val requestBuilder = okhttp3.Request.Builder()
   688→                    .url(url)
   689→                    .header("Range", "bytes=$start-$end")
   690→                    .header("User-Agent", "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36")
   691→                    .header("Referer", getRefererFromUrl(url))
   692→                    .header("Accept", "*/*")
   693→                    .header("Accept-Language", "zh-CN,zh;q=0.9,en;q=0.8")
   694→                    .header("Origin", getOriginFromUrl(url))
   695→
   696→                // 添加Cookie（如果提供）
   697→                if (!cookies.isNullOrEmpty()) {
   698→                    requestBuilder.header("Cookie", cookies)
   699→                }
   700→
   701→                val request = requestBuilder.build()
   702→                val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   703→
   704→                if (response.code !in 200..299) {
   705→                    val errorCode = response.code
   706→                    val urlHost = try { java.net.URL(url).host } catch (e: Exception) { "未知" }
   707→                    val errorMsg = when (errorCode) {
   708→                        403 -> {
   709→                            val hasCookie = !cookies.isNullOrEmpty()
   710→                            val isBilibili = urlHost.contains("bilibili") || urlHost.contains("bilivideo")
   711→                            if (isBilibili) {
   712→                                "HTTP 403 - B站下载被拒绝 ${if (hasCookie) "(已配置Cookie，可能已过期)" else "(未配置Cookie)"}"
   713→                            } else {
   714→                                "HTTP 403 - 下载被拒绝，可能需要Cookie或链接已过期"
   715→                            }
   716→                        }
   717→                        else -> "HTTP $errorCode - 分段下载失败"
   718→                    }
   719→                    throw IOException("$errorMsg (segment $start-$end)")
   720→                }
   721→
   722→                val inputStream = response.body?.byteStream() ?: throw IOException("No response body")
   723→                val raf = RandomAccessFile(file, "rw")
   724→                raf.seek(start)
   725→
   726→                val buffer = ByteArray(8 * 1024)
   727→                var bytes: Int
   728→                var totalBytes = 0L
   729→
   730→                while (inputStream.read(buffer).also { bytes = it } > 0) {
   731→                    raf.write(buffer, 0, bytes)
   732→                    totalBytes += bytes
   733→                    onBytesDownloaded(bytes.toLong())
   734→                }
   735→
   736→                raf.close()
   737→                inputStream.close()
   738→                return true
   739→
   740→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   741→                lastError = e
   742→                val isConnectionError = e.message?.contains("connection abort", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   743→                                     e.message?.contains("Software caused connection abort", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   744→                                     e is java.net.SocketException ||
   745→                                     e is javax.net.ssl.SSLException
   746→
   747→                if (!isConnectionError || attempt >= MAX_RETRY_COUNT - 1) {
   748→                    Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Segment $start-$end download failed", e)
   749→                    return false
   750→                }
   751→                Log.w("SegmentedDownloader", "Segment $start-$end connection error, will retry: ${e.message}")
   752→            }
   753→        }
   754→
   755→        Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Segment $start-$end failed after $MAX_RETRY_COUNT retries", lastError)
   756→        return false
   757→    }
   758→
   759→    /**
   760→     * 获取文件内容长度
   761→     */
   762→    private fun getContentLength(url: String): Long {
   763→        return try {
   764→            // 添加必要的 headers
   765→            val request = okhttp3.Request.Builder()
   766→                .url(url)
   767→                .head()
   768→                .header("User-Agent", "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36")
   769→                .header("Referer", getRefererFromUrl(url))
   770→                .build()
   771→
   772→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   773→
   774→            // 检查是否支持断点续传
   775→            val acceptRanges = response.header("Accept-Ranges") == "bytes"
   776→            val contentLength = response.body?.contentLength() ?: 0
   777→
   778→            if (acceptRanges && contentLength > 0) {
   779→                contentLength
   780→            } else {
   781→                0
   782→            }
   783→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   784→            Log.w("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to get content length", e)
   785→            0
   786→        }
   787→    }
   788→
   789→    /**
   790→     * 保存断点状态
   791→     */
   792→    private fun saveResumeState(file: File, segments: Set<Int>) {
   793→        try {
   794→            val stateFile = File(file.absolutePath + ".resume")
   795→            stateFile.writeText(segments.joinToString(","))
   796→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   797→            Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to save resume state", e)
   798→        }
   799→    }
   800→
   801→    /**
   802→     * 加载断点状态
   803→     */
   804→    private fun loadResumeState(file: File): MutableSet<Int> {
   805→        return try {
   806→            val stateFile = File(file.absolutePath + ".resume")
   807→            if (stateFile.exists()) {
   808→                val content = stateFile.readText()
   809→                if (content.isNotBlank()) {
   810→                    content.split(",").mapNotNull { it.toIntOrNull() }.toMutableSet()
   811→                } else {
   812→                    mutableSetOf()
   813→                }
   814→            } else {
   815→                mutableSetOf()
   816→            }
   817→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   818→            Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to load resume state", e)
   819→            mutableSetOf()
   820→        }
   821→    }
   822→
   823→    /**
   824→     * 清理断点状态
   825→     */
   826→    fun clearResumeState(file: File) {
   827→        try {
   828→            val stateFile = File(file.absolutePath + ".resume")
   829→            if (stateFile.exists()) {
   830→                stateFile.delete()
   831→            }
   832→            val tempFile = File(file.absolutePath + ".tmp")
   833→            if (tempFile.exists()) {
   834→                tempFile.delete()
   835→            }
   836→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   837→            Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to clear resume state", e)
   838→        }
   839→    }
   840→
   841→    /**
   842→     * 取消下载并清理临时文件
   843→     */
   844→    fun cancelDownload(outputFile: File) {
   845→        clearResumeState(outputFile)
   846→    }
   847→
   848→    /**
   849→     * 根据URL获取对应的Referer
   850→     * B站、YouTube等网站需要正确的Referer才能下载
   851→     */
   852→    private fun getRefererFromUrl(url: String): String {
   853→        return when {
   854→            url.contains("bilibili.com") || url.contains("b23.tv") || url.contains("bilivideo.com") -> "https://www.bilibili.com/"
   855→            url.contains("youtube.com") || url.contains("youtu.be") || url.contains("googlevideo.com") -> "https://www.youtube.com/"
   856→            url.contains("douyin.com") -> "https://www.douyin.com/"
   857→            url.contains("tiktok.com") -> "https://www.tiktok.com/"
   858→            else -> url
   859→        }
   860→    }
   861→
   862→    /**
   863→     * 根据URL获取Origin
   864→     */
   865→    private fun getOriginFromUrl(url: String): String {
   866→        return when {
   867→            url.contains("bilibili.com") || url.contains("b23.tv") || url.contains("bilivideo.com") -> "https://www.bilibili.com"
   868→            url.contains("youtube.com") || url.contains("youtu.be") || url.contains("googlevideo.com") -> "https://www.youtube.com"
   869→            url.contains("douyin.com") -> "https://www.douyin.com"
   870→            url.contains("tiktok.com") -> "https://www.tiktok.com"
   871→            else -> {
   872→                // 从URL中提取origin
   873→                val uri = java.net.URL(url)
   874→                "${uri.protocol}://${uri.host}"
   875→            }
   876→        }
   877→    }
   878→}
   879→

    19→@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)

    35→

   153→                ExposedDropdownMenu(expanded = providerExpanded, onDismissRequest = { providerExpanded = false }) {

   163→            Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   164→
   165→            // API Key
   166→            OutlinedTextField(

   168→                onValueChange = viewModel::setApiKey,

   170→                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   171→                singleLine = true
   172→            )
   173→
   174→            Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   175→
   176→            // Base URL + Model 并排
   177→            Row(horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(8.dp)) {
   178→                OutlinedTextField(
   179→                    value = uiState.baseUrl,
   180→                    onValueChange = viewModel::setBaseUrl,
   181→                    label = { Text("Base URL") },
   182→                    modifier = Modifier.weight(1f),
   183→                    singleLine = true,
   184→                    placeholder = { Text("默认") }
   185→                )

   336→/**
   337→ * 尝试从Cookie中提取B站相关数据
   338→ */
   339→private fun tryExtractCookies(
   340→    url: String,
   341→    onResult: (BilibiliCookies) -> Unit
   342→) {
   343→    val cookieManager = CookieManager.getInstance()
   344→    // 获取完整的Cookie（从.bilibili.com域）
   345→    val cookies = cookieManager.getCookie(url) ?: cookieManager.getCookie("https://www.bilibili.com")
   346→
   347→    var sessdata: String? = null
   348→    var biliJct: String? = null
   349→    var dedeUserID: String? = null
   350→
   351→    // 构建完整Cookie字符串（包含所有字段）
   352→    val fullCookieBuilder = StringBuilder()
   353→    val cookiePairs = mutableListOf<Pair<String, String>>()
   354→
   355→    // 解析Cookie字符串，保存所有字段
   356→    cookies?.split(";")?.forEach { cookie ->
   357→        val trimmed = cookie.trim()
   358→        val parts = trimmed.split("=", limit = 2)
   359→        if (parts.size == 2) {
   360→            val key = parts[0].trim()
   361→            val value = parts[1].trim()
   362→            cookiePairs.add(Pair(key, value))
   363→
   364→            // 提取关键字段用于验证
   365→            when (key) {
   366→                "SESSDATA" -> sessdata = value
   367→                "bili_jct" -> biliJct = value
   368→                "DedeUserID" -> dedeUserID = value
   369→            }
   370→        }
   371→    }
   372→
   373→    // 构建完整Cookie字符串（用于下载）
   374→    // 重要：buvid3, buvid4, _uuid 等字段对CDN下载很重要
   375→    val fullCookie = cookiePairs
   376→        .filter { (key, _) ->
   377→            // 保留所有重要的Cookie字段
   378→            key.startsWith("SESSDATA") ||
   379→            key.startsWith("bili_jct") ||
   380→            key.startsWith("DedeUserID") ||
   381→            key.startsWith("buvid") ||
   382→            key.startsWith("_uuid") ||
   383→            key.startsWith("CURRENT_FNVAL") ||
   384→            key.startsWith("b_nut") ||
   385→            key.startsWith("FEED_LIVE") ||
   386→            key.startsWith("LIVE_BUVID") ||
   387→            key.startsWith("finger")
   388→        }
   389→        .joinToString("; ") { (key, value) -> "$key=$value" }
   390→
   391→    Log.d("BilibiliLoginDialog", "Extracted ${cookiePairs.size} cookies, fullCookie length: ${fullCookie.length}")
   392→
   393→    onResult(BilibiliCookies(sessdata, biliJct, dedeUserID, fullCookie))
   394→}
   395→

    83→    val selectedLang: String = "en",
    84→    val activeDownloads: Map<String, DownloadTask> = emptyMap(),  // 所有正在下载的任务
    85→    val downloadQueue: List<DownloadTask> = emptyList(),
    86→    val downloadHistory: List<DownloadHistory> = emptyList(),

    89→    val showBilibiliLogin: Boolean = false,    // 显示B站登录对话框
    90→    val showYouTubeLogin: Boolean = false,    // 显示YouTube登录对话框

    94→    val showDuplicateDownloadConfirm: Boolean = false,  // 显示重复下载确认对话框
    95→    val duplicateVideoTitle: String = "",      // 重复视频的标题
    96→    // 转录队列状态

    98→    val transcriptionQueue: List<String> = emptyList(),  // 等待转录的视频列表
    99→    val transcriptionProgress: Int = 0,       // 转录进度百分比
   100→    val transcriptionMessage: String = "",    // 转录状态消息
   101→    // 交互提示事件

   104→)
   105→
   106→@HiltViewModel
   107→class HomeViewModel @Inject constructor(
   108→    @SuppressLint("StaticFieldLeak") private val application: Application,
   109→    private val videoRepository: VideoRepository,
   110→    private val themeStore: ThemeStore,
   111→    private val videoConfigStore: com.multilanglearner.data.store.VideoConfigStore,
   112→    private val segmentedDownloader: SegmentedDownloader
   113→) : AndroidViewModel(application) {
   114→
   115→    val currentTheme = themeStore.theme
   116→    val currentFontSize = themeStore.fontSize
   117→
   118→    private var currentBilibiliCookie: String? = null
   119→    private var currentYouTubeCookie: String? = null
   120→    private var currentDouyinCookie: String? = null
   121→    private var currentTiktokCookie: String? = null
   122→
   123→    init {
   124→        // 收集Cookie配置
   125→        viewModelScope.launch {
   126→            videoConfigStore.config.collect { config ->
   127→                currentBilibiliCookie = config.getBilibiliCookie()
   128→                currentYouTubeCookie = config.getYouTubeCookie()

   134→
   135→    private val videoDownloadService by lazy {
   136→        VideoDownloadService(
   137→            bilibiliCookieProvider = { currentBilibiliCookie },
   138→            youtubeCookieProvider = { currentYouTubeCookie },
   139→            douyinCookieProvider = { currentDouyinCookie },
   140→            tiktokCookieProvider = { currentTiktokCookie }
   141→        )
   142→    }
   143→
   144→    private val _uiState = MutableStateFlow(HomeUiState())
   145→    val uiState: StateFlow<HomeUiState> = _uiState.asStateFlow()
   146→
   147→    private val _downloadHistory = MutableStateFlow<List<DownloadHistory>>(emptyList())
   148→    val downloadHistory: StateFlow<List<DownloadHistory>> = _downloadHistory.asStateFlow()
   149→
   150→    // 当前下载任务（支持并发）
   151→    private val activeDownloadJobs = mutableMapOf<String, Job>()  // taskId -> Job
   152→    private val activeDownloadTasks = mutableMapOf<String, DownloadTask>()  // taskId -> Task
   153→
   154→    // 最大并发下载数
   155→    private val MAX_CONCURRENT_DOWNLOADS = 3
   156→
   157→    // 下载队列
   158→    private val downloadQueue = mutableMapOf<String, DownloadTask>()
   159→
   160→    val downloadsDir: File
   161→        get() = File(application.getExternalFilesDir(null), "videos").apply {
   162→            if (!exists()) mkdirs()

   164→
   165→    init {

   167→            videoRepository.getAll().collect { videos ->
   168→                _uiState.update { it.copy(videos = videos) }
   169→            }
   170→        }
   171→
   172→        // 加载下载历史
   173→        loadDownloadHistory()
   174→    }
   175→
   176→    fun setUrl(url: String) { _uiState.update { it.copy(url = url) } }
   177→    fun setLang(lang: String) { _uiState.update { it.copy(selectedLang = lang) } }
   178→    fun clearSnackbar() { _uiState.update { it.copy(snackbarMessage = null) } }
   179→    fun clearSwitchTab() { _uiState.update { it.copy(switchToTab = null) } }
   180→
